use_cases: Displaying 3D GLTF models rendered as ASCII art characters in an interactive canvas
Rotating and zooming 3D model assets with orbit controls for inspection
Customizing ASCII rendering resolution and character sets via settings dialog
Selecting from multiple pre-loaded 3D models for visualization
Creative visualization of 3D assets with retro terminal aesthetic
ai_summary: An interactive 3D model viewer that renders GLTF models as ASCII art characters using React Three Fiber and Drei's AsciiRenderer. Features orbit controls for model rotation, a settings dialog for adjusting ASCII resolution and character options, and a model selector for switching between pre-loaded 3D assets. Dark, terminal-inspired aesthetic suitable for dev tools and creative applications.
